Use case:
Game Generation

A human user wants to build a game. They use this system to develop a PDF work effort that is a few thousand pages long. 

It includes detailed instructions for the AI Agents, with images, flowcharts, game assets, and more.

The system I’m designing uses autonomous AI agents to perform work defined in a PDF, who go and complete the work, then generate a new PDF, and wait for a human to sign off before proceeding.

This directly mirrors the way we already perform work on all kinds of projects.

There can be a system that spins up AI Agents to perform work autonomously. 

These Agents can generate human-readable PDF Work Efforts that are encrypted and password protected.

The human user can be required to sign off on the PDF before the AI is allowed to proceed.
